series_metadata.series_description: Certification, actuary appointment, and supporting documentation required to be filed for life insurance products that involve use of illustations in the sale of the product. Authority: OAC 3901-6-04.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until imaged, then destroy hard copy. Retain image 4 years after end of calendar reporting year, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until imaged, then destroy hard copy. Retain image 4 years after end of calendar reporting year, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
